titles.name: Gunsō
titles.assigned_by: Imperial Legions — commissioned a chūi (lieutenant); Gunsō title used for the mechanics; Status held at baseline per campaign ruling
titles.ability: Lead from the Front: when you defeat an opponent in a clash, your cohort removes panic equal to the opponent's glory rank; once per round on a successful Attack check in a mass battle, your cohort removes panic equal to half the attrition you inflict.

log.reason: Lost a death-duel to Matsu Kasumi before both armies; the edict broke and the Lion crossed his post. Spared for the grace with which he met death.
Refused to yield, met certain death with grace, apologized sincerely for his taunt, and honored his enemy — conduct that moved a Matsu to spare him.

Correcting an erroneous +3, then applying the real loss: public death-duel defeat and the edict broken on his post (Lion crossed west). Net -3 from 35 → 32; the grace that spared him keeps it from being worse.
